form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation when last of 9 at Kenilworth in the G3 Final Fling Stakes January 31 over 2000m, 8 len behind Time For Love with 58.5kg at $41. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.9 len this track October 23 over 1450m defeating Elegantrix with 60kg at $4.50. Happy to work around.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 3rd of 11 at Turffontein Standside in G3 on March 21 over 1160m, 1.5 len behind Perfect Miracle with 58kg at $8.50. Previously second-up won by 0.5 len at Turffontein Inside November 13 over 1200m defeating Blizzard Snow carrying 60kg at $1.90. Even fitter and is an excellent winning chance.

form.formComment: Most recently 9th of 11 at Turffontein Standside in G3 on March 21 over 1160m, 8 len behind Perfect Miracle with 55.5kg at $13.50. The race before that won by 0.5 len at this track February 10 over 1200m defeating Tuscan Romance carrying 60kg at $11. Winner in similar grade two back then tackled stakes class latest and was well held. This easier and worth another chance.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 33-day let-up. Most recently 4th of 7 at Turffontein Inside on March 12 over 1200m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Bright And Brazen with 59.5kg at $13.50. The run before that ran last in a small field at this track on January 27 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Poblano carrying 58kg at $5. Strong winning hope.
